channel.title: SecurityWizardry Vulnerability Radar (RMFconsultoria)
channel.description: Alertas do SecurityWizardry.com Radar Page - Curado por RMFconsultoria

item.title: TrendMicro - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 7.2-9.8
item.description: Friday 22 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 7.2-9.8 | Apex One 2019 and Apex One as a Service protect endpoints; flaws allow remote code execution and privilege escalation.

item.title: Ubiquiti - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 7.7-10.0
item.description: Friday 22 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 7.7-10.0 | UniFi OS Server and other devices; flaws allow remote command injection, unauthorised system changes, path traversal, and data exposure.

item.title: Honeywell - OT - CVSS Score v3 - 9.1
item.description: Friday 22 May 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Honeywell Control Network Module manages industrial networks; it has a command injection flaw in its web interface allowing remote code execution.

item.title: LiteLLM - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 8.8
item.description: Friday 22 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | LiteLLM by berriai provides API key management; internal users can create keys bypassing role limits, enabling privilege escalation. More info....

item.title: Mattermost - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Friday 22 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Mattermost collaboration platform; path traversal flaw allows authenticated users to call arbitrary API via system admin token in integration URL.

item.title: IBM - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - Multiple
item.description: Friday 22 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | IBM Multiple vulnerabilities in Axios enable flaws enable code execution, authentication bypass, data tampering, SSRF, header injection and DoS.

item.title: Cisco - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | Cisco Secure Workload protects workloads; flaw in REST API access validation allows remote attacker to gain Site Admin privileges and alter configurations.

item.title: Microsoft - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Microsoft Malware Protection Engine scans for malware; heap-based buffer overflow in Microsoft Defender allows remote code execution.

item.title: NLnet - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 10.0 | NLnet Labs Unbound DNS resolver caches DNS data; allow cache poisoning via spoofed authority section records.

item.title: LiteSpeed - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 10.0
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 10.0 | LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin manages web hosting control; it allows privilege escalation via Redis feature mishandling, exploited in May 2026. More info....

item.title: HP - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.3
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | HP Linux Imaging and Printing Software manages printing tasks; integer overflow in hpcups may allow privilege escalation or code execution.

item.title: IBM - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - Multiple
item.description: Thursday 21 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | IBM Guardium Data Protection has multiple high and critical vulnerabilities including denial-of-service, memory corruption, and certificate validation flaws.

item.title: RedHat - Security - CVSS Score v3 - 8.1
item.description: Wednesday 20 May 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Keycloak: Identity and access management system; flaw in URL validation allows redirect bypass with crafted URLs, risking sensitive data exposure.

item.title: Atlassian - Monthly - CVSS Score v3 - 7.1-9.1
item.description: Wednesday 20 May 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 7.1-9.1 | Monthly - Number of patches: 42 Number of critical patches: 3

item.title: Dell - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - Multiple
item.description: Wednesday 20 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | Dell SmartFabric Storage Software remediation is available for multiple security vulnerabilities that could be exploited by malicious users to compromise the affected system.

item.title: F5 - Patch - CVSS Score v4 - 9.2
item.description: Wednesday 20 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.2 | F5 NGINX JavaScript manages web server scripting; a heap buffer overflow via js_fetch_proxy with client variables can crash or enable code execution. More info....

item.title: NVIDIA - Patch - CVSS Score v3 - 5.3-9.8
item.description: Wednesday 20 May 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 5.3-9.8 | AI inference server; vulnerabilities allow authentication bypass, memory flaws, remote code execution, and DoS.
